message:
fix: enforce immutable kernel — reject agent names that shadow primitives

Implements spec §12 (Immutable Kernel). LearnProcess.applyMutation() now
validates create_agent names against two protected sets: kernel primitives
(read_file, write_file, etc.) and kernel reserved names (learn, perceive,
plan, act, verify, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
